review_criteria: Verify that the amendment clearly explains the rationale for re-sequencing the milestones (matching the executed Autonomous M1/M2 flow).
Verify that the revised sequence correctly lists V0.6-M1 (Hygiene) and V0.6-M2 (Archive Consolidation) as the first two executed steps.
Verify that the revised sequence correctly assigns the remaining required V0.6 objectives (Docs Center, Bootstrap, API Hardening, Framework Separation/Comparison) to M3 through M6.
Verify that this amendment does not drop any previously approved V0.6 objectives or V0.5 carry-overs.
Verify that NO implementation files or directories are modified by this amendment document.
